overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage showing a player character holding a pistol while exploring a modern concrete coastal facility with glass walkways overlooking turquoise ocean water. The player ascends stairs, moves through covered walkways, discovers a deceased worker, and observes a military jet flying overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking along transparent glass walkway overlooking ocean, then climbing metal stairs while holding pistol

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a transparent glass coastal walkway with turquoise ocean visible below and ahead. The camera approaches and begins ascending a metal staircase built into the cliffside, with rocky outcrops visible to the right and open sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper concrete platform and narrow courtyard between buildings

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters building platform area
looks upward toward sky while moving through narrow courtyard

agents.ego_description: moving through upper concrete platform and narrow courtyard, looking up at the sky and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with geometric overhangs
dark entrance with red interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an upper concrete platform beside a brutalist building, leaving the stairs behind. Moving through a narrow courtyard between concrete walls, the camera pans upward to reveal the sky and rocky cliff face now visible to the left, while the ocean remains visible to the right.

events.description: enters shadow beneath large concrete overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway beneath building overhang, moving toward equipment area

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling creating deep shadow over walkway
industrial equipment with red illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a shaded covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overhang, transitioning from bright sunlight to diffused shadow. Industrial equipment with red lighting becomes visible on the left as the walkway continues alongside the building with the ocean still visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with glass floor section and deceased worker

events.description: discovers deceased worker in safety vest lying against wall

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing deceased NPC worker lying on the ground near glass floor section

notable_agents.action: deceased worker in orange safety vest and hard hat lying face down against concrete wall

entered.detail: transparent floor panels revealing rocky debris and water below

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the covered walkway where the floor transitions to transparent glass panels revealing rocks below. A deceased worker in an orange safety vest lies against the right wall, which the player approaches and observes before continuing.

events.description: military jet aircraft flies low overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway while observing military jet aircraft flying overhead

notable_agents.action: military jet aircraft flying low overhead from right to left across the sky

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the deceased worker and continues along the covered walkway with glass flooring. Suddenly, a military jet aircraft flies low overhead from right to left, prompting the camera to pan upward to track the aircraft against the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, sunlit coastal walkway into the shadowed corridors of a brutalist concrete facility. It begins by traversing a transparent glass path over turquoise waters before ascending a metal staircase built into a rocky cliffside. As the camera emerges onto an upper concrete platform, it moves through a narrow courtyard where the open sky and cliff face frame the view, eventually transitioning from bright sunlight into the diffused shadows of a massive covered walkway. The scene then shifts across glass floor panels and past a deceased worker in an orange safety vest leaning against the wall, while industrial equipment with red lighting glows to the left. Finally, the camera pans upward toward the cloudy sky to track a military jet as it screams low overhead from right to left.
